name: ShCh-317
events: 16 Jun 1942 ShCh-317 torpedoed and sank the Finnish merchant Argo (2513 GRT) in the Baltic east of Stockholm, Sweden in position 59°21'N, 20°14'E.
Later this day ShCh-317 attacked but misses the Swedish merchant Ulla (2436 GRT). Ulla had survivors aboard from the Argo.
19 Jun 1942 ShCh-317 torpedoed and damaged the Danish merchant Orion (2405 GRT) north-east of Gotland in position 58°08'N, 18°00'E. The damaged Danish ship was towed to Visby.
22 Jun 1942 ShCh-317 torpedoed and sank the Swedish merchant Ada Gorthon (2399 GRT) west of Gotland in position 57°09'N, 18°00'E.
8 Jul 1942 ShCh-317 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Otto Cords (966 GRT) off the Swedish south coast in position 55°49'N, 15°01'E.
14 Jul 1942 During the first and last patrol of the boat, the submarine division commander Captain 2nd Rank V.A. Yegorov was on board, and was lost with the boat. (1)
